news.title:
IFGL Refractories' CEO resigned effective 6th April 2026 for personal reasons.
CEO expressed gratitude and commitment for a smooth transition; no successor details shared.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories' CEO resigned effective 6th April 2026 for personal reasons.
CEO expressed gratitude and commitment for a smooth transition; no successor details shared.

news.title: IFGL Refractories resumes operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility.
news.summary: IFGL Refractories resumes operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories halts Kandla facility operations due to LPG supply disruption amid Gulf conflict.
Impact on production, operations, or financials remains unclear; management is monitoring closely.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories halts Kandla facility operations due to LPG supply disruption amid Gulf conflict.
Impact on production, operations, or financials remains unclear; management is monitoring closely.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories' consolidated revenue rose 23% YoY; standalone up 16%.
Domestic market grew 25% in 9MFY26; new MD to join from March 2026.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories' consolidated revenue rose 23% YoY; standalone up 16%.
Domestic market grew 25% in 9MFY26; new MD to join from March 2026.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories starts new 10,000 MT/year plastic refractories line at Visakhapatnam plant.
Tech from Sheffield Refractories, UK; Rs 2.1 crore investment to cut imports and meet demand.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories starts new 10,000 MT/year plastic refractories line at Visakhapatnam plant.
Tech from Sheffield Refractories, UK; Rs 2.1 crore investment to cut imports and meet demand.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹231M from ₹169M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 4.92% from 4.4% YoY.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹231M from ₹169M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 4.92% from 4.4% YoY.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories to participate in 3QFY26 Conference Call on 17th Feb 2026, organized by Monarch Networth.
CEO Arasu Shanmugam and CFO Amit Agarwal to discuss earnings update; details available on IFGL's website.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories to participate in 3QFY26 Conference Call on 17th Feb 2026, organized by Monarch Networth.
CEO Arasu Shanmugam and CFO Amit Agarwal to discuss earnings update; details available on IFGL's website.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories Ltd's board meeting on 14 Feb 2026 will review unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed since 1 Jan 2026, reopening 48 hours post-results declaration.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories Ltd's board meeting on 14 Feb 2026 will review unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed since 1 Jan 2026, reopening 48 hours post-results declaration.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories Ltd announced CHRO Abhay Kapoor's resignation effective 27th Jan 2026.
Resignation cited personal reasons; details available on the company website.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories Ltd announced CHRO Abhay Kapoor's resignation effective 27th Jan 2026.
Resignation cited personal reasons; details available on the company website.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories' UK unit Sheffield Refractories' auditor C J Woodhead & Co Ltd went insolvent on 28 Oct 2025.
The subsidiary plans to appoint a new auditor soon, as disclosed to exchanges and investors.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories' UK unit Sheffield Refractories' auditor C J Woodhead & Co Ltd went insolvent on 28 Oct 2025.
The subsidiary plans to appoint a new auditor soon, as disclosed to exchanges and investors.

news.title:
Supreme Court allows IFGL Refractories' subsidy claim since 2003.
Approved claim is Rs.11.1 lakh with 9% annual interest; judgement details awaited.
news.summary:
Supreme Court allows IFGL Refractories' subsidy claim since 2003.
Approved claim is Rs.11.1 lakh with 9% annual interest; judgement details awaited.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories appoints Abhay Kapoor as CHRO effective 17th Dec 2025.
Dr. Sushil Kumar Ojha ceases as Senior Management, now reporting to CHRO.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories appoints Abhay Kapoor as CHRO effective 17th Dec 2025.
Dr. Sushil Kumar Ojha ceases as Senior Management, now reporting to CHRO.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories promoter sold 4,37,490 shares, face value Rs. 10 each.
Shares sold off-market, representing 0.61% of total shares, disclosed as required.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories promoter sold 4,37,490 shares, face value Rs. 10 each.
Shares sold off-market, representing 0.61% of total shares, disclosed as required.

news.title:
Bajoria Financial Services acquired 4,37,490 shares of IFGL Refractories Ltd via promoter inter se transfer.
Post-acquisition, Bajoria Group's stake in IFGL rose to 72.43% from 71.82%; shares listed on NSE and BSE.
news.summary:
Bajoria Financial Services acquired 4,37,490 shares of IFGL Refractories Ltd via promoter inter se transfer.
Post-acquisition, Bajoria Group's stake in IFGL rose to 72.43% from 71.82%; shares listed on NSE and BSE.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories Ltd disclosed a letter dated 4th Dec 2025 under SEBI Regulation 29 (2).
The disclosure pertains to Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers Regulations, 2011.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories Ltd disclosed a letter dated 4th Dec 2025 under SEBI Regulation 29 (2).
The disclosure pertains to Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers Regulations, 2011.

news.title:
Bajoria Financial Services bought 4.37L shares from Mr. Mihir Bajoria at Rs 212/share.
Inter se promoter transfer keeps promoter shareholding unchanged at 72.43%, involving 0.61% equity.
news.summary:
Bajoria Financial Services bought 4.37L shares from Mr. Mihir Bajoria at Rs 212/share.
Inter se promoter transfer keeps promoter shareholding unchanged at 72.43%, involving 0.61% equity.

news.title:
Dr. Sushil Kumar Ojha appointed CHRO of IFGL Refractories Ltd effective 24th Nov 2025.
Ojha brings 20+ years HR expertise, holds Ph.D., MBA, and BA in Economics.
news.summary:
Dr. Sushil Kumar Ojha appointed CHRO of IFGL Refractories Ltd effective 24th Nov 2025.
Ojha brings 20+ years HR expertise, holds Ph.D., MBA, and BA in Economics.

news.title:
IFGL Refractories reported steady Q2 FY26 results with consolidated income up 18% YoY, driven by domestic revenue growth of 27%.
The company focuses on India-made products, strong domestic market, and expanding global presence, with ongoing capex projects in Odisha and Gujarat.
news.summary:
IFGL Refractories reported steady Q2 FY26 results with consolidated income up 18% YoY, driven by domestic revenue growth of 27%.
The company focuses on India-made products, strong domestic market, and expanding global presence, with ongoing capex projects in Odisha and Gujarat.
